title: Software Engineer
description: Design, build and maintain software systems — from mobile apps to cloud infrastructure.
whySuitsYou: You have a strong analytical mind, enjoy solving complex problems logically, and are comfortable spending long hours in a technical environment.

title: Graphic Designer
description: Create visual concepts — logos, layouts, branding — that communicate ideas to audiences.
whySuitsYou: Your strong creative instincts, eye for aesthetics, and ability to translate ideas into visuals make design a natural fit.

title: Doctor
description: Diagnose and treat illness, working closely with patients across a wide range of conditions.
whySuitsYou: You combine empathy with sharp analytical thinking, can handle pressure well, and are motivated by helping people directly.

title: Teacher
description: Educate and inspire students, planning lessons and nurturing learning in classroom settings.
whySuitsYou: You are patient, articulate, and genuinely energised by helping others understand things — explaining comes naturally to you.

title: Entrepreneur
description: Build and grow businesses from scratch, taking calculated risks to create something new.
whySuitsYou: You thrive on independence, are comfortable with uncertainty, and have the drive and resourcefulness to turn ideas into reality.

title: Data Scientist
description: Extract insights from large datasets using statistics, machine learning, and visualisation.
whySuitsYou: You love finding patterns in complexity, think quantitatively, and enjoy the process of turning raw data into meaningful stories.

title: Architect
description: Design buildings and spaces, balancing aesthetics, function, safety, and sustainability.
whySuitsYou: You think both creatively and analytically, care about how spaces feel and function, and enjoy long-term, detail-oriented projects.

title: Nurse
description: Provide hands-on patient care, administer treatments, and support recovery in clinical settings.
whySuitsYou: You are compassionate and calm under pressure, enjoy being physically active in your work, and take satisfaction in making people feel cared for.

title: Lawyer
description: Advise clients on legal matters, draft documents, and advocate in courts or negotiations.
whySuitsYou: You argue persuasively, think precisely, and enjoy mastering complex rule systems — and you perform well under pressure.

title: Chef
description: Create and prepare dishes at a professional level, often leading a kitchen team.
whySuitsYou: You are creative with your hands, love immediate tangible results, and thrive in a fast-paced, high-energy environment.

title: Marketing Manager
description: Plan and execute campaigns to grow brand awareness and drive customer acquisition.
whySuitsYou: You blend creative storytelling with data-driven thinking, and enjoy influencing how people perceive products and ideas.

title: Civil Engineer
description: Design and oversee construction of infrastructure — roads, bridges, water systems.
whySuitsYou: You like applying maths and science to real-world problems, enjoy seeing physical results, and are methodical in your approach.

title: Psychologist
description: Study human behaviour and help clients work through mental and emotional challenges.
whySuitsYou: You are a deep listener, genuinely curious about what drives people, and comfortable sitting with ambiguity and complexity.

title: Journalist
description: Research and write stories that inform the public, working across print, broadcast, or digital media.
whySuitsYou: You are naturally curious, communicate well, and enjoy digging into topics — especially when the stakes feel real.

title: Financial Analyst
description: Analyse financial data to guide investment decisions and business strategy.
whySuitsYou: You are comfortable with numbers, think rigorously, and enjoy translating complex data into clear recommendations.

title: Physiotherapist
description: Help patients recover from injury or manage physical conditions through targeted exercise and therapy.
whySuitsYou: You enjoy hands-on work, understand the body well, and get satisfaction from seeing measurable progress in the people you help.

title: UX Designer
description: Design digital products that are intuitive, accessible, and enjoyable to use.
whySuitsYou: You are empathetic to users, think systematically about flows and interactions, and care deeply about the quality of the final experience.

title: Electrician
description: Install, maintain, and repair electrical systems in homes, businesses, and industrial settings.
whySuitsYou: You prefer practical, hands-on work with clear technical standards, enjoy problem-solving in the physical world, and like seeing a job done.

title: Film Director
description: Lead the creative vision of a film — from script to screen — collaborating with large teams.
whySuitsYou: You have a strong visual imagination, natural leadership presence, and thrive when orchestrating many creative elements towards a single vision.

title: Research Scientist
description: Conduct experiments and investigate phenomena to advance knowledge in a specialist field.
whySuitsYou: You are patient, rigorous, and intrinsically motivated by understanding how things work — you enjoy the process, not just the result.
